scores.evidence: frozen_input.json mode=scan and decision.json contains the full workflow outputs
all runtime artifacts freeze 2024-12-31 and evidence source dates are cutoff-validated
memo.md presents a theme-only decision, funded demand, and a role-neutral system map before its Security map first introduces GEV, ETN, and other named companies
evidence.json has claim-level primary-led independent origins and a documented negative search
decision.json and memo.md separate scarcity, monetization, and discovery
decision.json traces the per-share bridge, exposes every unverified multiplier, and fails the hard gate
bear/base/bull sensitivities exist, but no Tier A cutoff closing price was admitted and expectation gap remains UNKNOWN
decision.json strongest_countercase and documented_negative_search attack category error, capacity response, capture, and valuation
portfolio.json produces a 0.857 GEV|ETN causal overlap and near-duplicate alert
the run stops at the failed rent-capture gate and does not create a large ticker list or outcome study
research-only, no-leverage, no-automatic-trading clauses; no account, broker, order, or guaranteed-return action

limitations: This is the Historical E2E self-audit, not the independent forward-test reserved for BSS-S3-P2-T002.
The rubric does not convert BOTTLENECK_NOT_EQUITY into a negative Skill result; preserving the failed equity gate is the required behavior.
Stage 3 Review remains pending and owns the later independent verification of this evidence.
